note: S2 Relax cycle: 43 normal attacks per stack x 20 stacks -> heal proc -> team Attack Damage 20.99% for 7s. Modeled as an 860-hit trigger. Taunt/invuln/heal portions dropped (defensive). NAMU CROSS-CHECK (2026-07-13): her S1 'One For All' actually targets DISJOINT groups - burst casters get caster-ATK 64.51% + reload 44.35%, NON-casters get caster-DEF 37.44% + reload 44.35% - so no single unit ever legitimately receives both 44.35% reload lines; the same-caster-same-slot overwrite rule fixes the parser's both-lines-to-everyone artifact and matches the real kit structure.
